narrative_beat: Overhead mapa renascentista com maos enluvadas movendo moedas de ouro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a Renaissance-style painted world map mural covering a table, with three unequal piles of gold coins and a gloved hand transferring coins between piles
subject.focal_point: the white-gloved hand mid-transfer holding gold coins
subject.secondary: Map painted in rich colors with gold leaf borders. Three distinct piles of gold coins of different heights.

environment.location: a Vatican-style grand hall with marble columns

composition.foreground: gold coins and gloved hand in rich warm tones
composition.midground: painted map in rich Renaissance colors
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white marble columns of the Vatican hall

lighting.key_light: warm torchlight from multiple sconces above
lighting.fill_light: soft amber bounce from gold coins

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: global wealth as a game of chess — coins moved at will
symbolism.secondary: the gloved hand as invisible puppet master

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
